title: Dill Bliss Vegan Tandoori Soup
description: A light and flavorful umami soup featuring dill and vegan-friendly ingredients for a sick-day comfort dish reminiscent of Portuguese cuisine.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup vegan sour cream or cashew cream
2 tablespoons tamarind paste (or 2 teaspoons tamarind concentrate dissolved in hot water)

instructions: In a pot, combine vegetable broth and tamarind paste with the juice of half a lemon. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and stir in dill, vegan sour cream or cashew cream, ground cumin, and salt until smooth.
Simmer for about 5-10 minutes until desired consistency is reached.
